content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(i) — Privacy policy claims (camera-only, on-device Vision OCR, no location/analytics/ads/sharing) match the code: only AVFoundation camera + on-device Vision usage in ReceiptCaptureView.swift:1-33, no CoreLocation/analytics SDKs, consistent with the "all on your device" description (description.txt:1) and policy at privacy_url.txt.
